---
title: "Trucktrack on Valhalla"
author: "Jesse Tweedle"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
lightbox: auto
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Tile hierarchy](figures/hierarchy-grid.png){group="valhalla"}

![Tile zoom](figures/tile-zoom.png){group="valhalla"}

![Trip footprint over tiles](figures/trip-footprint.png){group="valhalla"}

![Tier classification](figures/tier-classification.png){group="valhalla"}

![Partition cells](figures/partition-cells.png){group="valhalla"}

![Hilbert ordering](figures/hilbert-locality.png){group="valhalla"}

![Clean trace](figures/bridge-clean.png){group="valhalla"}

![Gappy trace, no bridge](figures/bridge-no-bridge.png){group="valhalla"}

![Gappy trace, bridged](figures/bridge-with-bridge.png){group="valhalla"}
:::
